dialogue.text: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.
dialogue.zh: 放手吧，放手吧，已經無法再忍耐了。
dialogue.ja: ありのままに、もう抑えられない。
dialogue.local: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.
dialogue.local_pron: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.
dialogue.en: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.
dialogue.en_pron: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.

dialogue.text: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.
dialogue.zh: 放手吧，放手吧，轉身關上門。
dialogue.ja: ありのままに、背を向けて扉を閉める。
dialogue.local: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.
dialogue.local_pron: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.
dialogue.en: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.
dialogue.en_pron: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.

dialogue.text: The snow glows white on the mountain tonight, not a footprint to be seen.
dialogue.zh: 今晚山上白雪皚皚，沒有留下任何腳印。
dialogue.ja: 今夜、山は雪で真っ白、足跡ひとつない。
dialogue.local: The snow glows white on the mountain tonight, not a footprint to be seen.
dialogue.local_pron: The snow glows white on the mountain tonight, not a footprint to be seen.
dialogue.en: The snow glows white on the mountain tonight, not a footprint to be seen.
dialogue.en_pron: The snow glows white on the mountain tonight, not a footprint to be seen.

dialogue.text: A kingdom of isolation, and it looks like I'm the queen.
dialogue.zh: 這是一個孤獨的王國，看起來我是女王。
dialogue.ja: 孤独の王国、私が女王のようだ。
dialogue.local: A kingdom of isolation, and it looks like I'm the queen.
dialogue.local_pron: A kingdom of isolation, and it looks like I'm the queen.
dialogue.en: A kingdom of isolation, and it looks like I'm the queen.
dialogue.en_pron: A kingdom of isolation, and it looks like I'm the queen.

dialogue.text: The wind is howling like this swirling storm inside.
dialogue.zh: 風在呼嘯，像我內心的暴風雨。
dialogue.ja: 風が吠えている、心の嵐のように。
dialogue.local: The wind is howling like this swirling storm inside.
dialogue.local_pron: The wind is howling like this swirling storm inside.
dialogue.en: The wind is howling like this swirling storm inside.
dialogue.en_pron: The wind is howling like this swirling storm inside.

dialogue.text: Couldn't keep it in, heaven knows I tried.
dialogue.zh: 無法再忍住，天知道我努力過。
dialogue.ja: 抑えきれなかった、神様が私の努力を知っている。
dialogue.local: Couldn't keep it in, heaven knows I tried.
dialogue.local_pron: Couldn't keep it in, heaven knows I tried.
dialogue.en: Couldn't keep it in, heaven knows I tried.
dialogue.en_pron: Couldn't keep it in, heaven knows I tried.

dialogue.text: Don't let them in
dialogue.zh: 別讓他們進來
dialogue.ja: 誰も入れないで。
dialogue.local: Don't let them in
dialogue.local_pron: Don't let them in
dialogue.en: Don't let them in
dialogue.en_pron: Don't let them in

dialogue.text: don't let them see
dialogue.zh: 別讓他們看到
dialogue.ja: 誰にも見せないで。
dialogue.local: don't let them see
dialogue.local_pron: don't let them see
dialogue.en: don't let them see
dialogue.en_pron: don't let them see

dialogue.text: be the good girl you always had to be.
dialogue.zh: 要當個乖女孩，像你一直以來必須的那樣。
dialogue.ja: いつもそうでなければならなかった良い子でいて。
dialogue.local: be the good girl you always had to be.
dialogue.local_pron: be the good girl you always had to be.
dialogue.en: be the good girl you always had to be.
dialogue.en_pron: be the good girl you always had to be.

dialogue.text: Can feel, don't feel, don't let them know, well now they know.
dialogue.zh: 能感覺到，卻不去感覺，別讓他們知道，好吧，現在他們知道了。
dialogue.ja: 感じて、感じないふりして、秘密にして、でも今はバレた。
dialogue.local: Can feel, don't feel, don't let them know, well now they know.
dialogue.local_pron: Can feel, don't feel, don't let them know, well now they know.
dialogue.en: Can feel, don't feel, don't let them know, well now they know.
dialogue.en_pron: Can feel, don't feel, don't let them know, well now they know.

dialogue.text: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.
dialogue.zh: 放手吧，放手吧，已經無法再忍耐了。
dialogue.ja: ありのままに、もう抑えられない。
dialogue.local: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.
dialogue.local_pron: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.
dialogue.en: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.
dialogue.en_pron: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.

dialogue.text: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.
dialogue.zh: 放手吧，放手吧，轉身關上門。
dialogue.ja: ありのままに、背を向けて扉を閉める。
dialogue.local: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.
dialogue.local_pron: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.
dialogue.en: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.
dialogue.en_pron: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.

dialogue.text: And here I stand, and here I'll stay.
dialogue.zh: 我站在這裡，將會留在這裡。
dialogue.ja: ここに立ち、ここに留まる。
dialogue.local: And here I stand, and here I'll stay.
dialogue.local_pron: And here I stand, and here I'll stay.
dialogue.en: And here I stand, and here I'll stay.
dialogue.en_pron: And here I stand, and here I'll stay.

dialogue.text: Let it go, let it go.
dialogue.zh: 放手吧，放手吧。
dialogue.ja: ありのままに、ありのままに。
dialogue.local: Let it go, let it go.
dialogue.local_pron: Let it go, let it go.
dialogue.en: Let it go, let it go.
dialogue.en_pron: Let it go, let it go.

dialogue.text: The cold never bothered me anyway.
dialogue.zh: 反正寒冷從未困擾過我。
dialogue.ja: 寒さなんて気にならない。
dialogue.local: The cold never bothered me anyway.
dialogue.local_pron: The cold never bothered me anyway.
dialogue.en: The cold never bothered me anyway.
dialogue.en_pron: The cold never bothered me anyway.

dialogue.text: It's funny how some distance makes everything seem small.
dialogue.zh: 有趣的是，距離讓一切看起來都變小了。
dialogue.ja: 距離ができると全てが小さく見えるのは面白い。
dialogue.local: It's funny how some distance makes everything seem small.
dialogue.local_pron: It's funny how some distance makes everything seem small.
dialogue.en: It's funny how some distance makes everything seem small.
dialogue.en_pron: It's funny how some distance makes everything seem small.

dialogue.text: And the fuse that once controlled me can't get to me at all.
dialogue.zh: 曾經控制我的導火線，現在完全無法影響我。
dialogue.ja: かつて私を縛っていた導火線はもう届かない。
dialogue.local: And the fuse that once controlled me can't get to me at all.
dialogue.local_pron: And the fuse that once controlled me can't get to me at all.
dialogue.en: And the fuse that once controlled me can't get to me at all.
dialogue.en_pron: And the fuse that once controlled me can't get to me at all.

dialogue.text: Appearing the cold thin air, I finally can breathe.
dialogue.zh: 出現在寒冷稀薄的空氣中，我終於能呼吸了。
dialogue.ja: 冷たく薄い空気の中で、やっと息ができる。
dialogue.local: Appearing the cold thin air, I finally can breathe.
dialogue.local_pron: Appearing the cold thin air, I finally can breathe.
dialogue.en: Appearing the cold thin air, I finally can breathe.
dialogue.en_pron: Appearing the cold thin air, I finally can breathe.

dialogue.text: I know I left a life behind, but I'm too relieved to grieve.
dialogue.zh: 我知道我離開了過去的生活，但我太輕鬆了，無暇悲傷。
dialogue.ja: 過去の生活を置いてきたけど、悲しむ余裕はない。
dialogue.local: I know I left a life behind, but I'm too relieved to grieve.
dialogue.local_pron: I know I left a life behind, but I'm too relieved to grieve.
dialogue.en: I know I left a life behind, but I'm too relieved to grieve.
dialogue.en_pron: I know I left a life behind, but I'm too relieved to grieve.

dialogue.ja: ありのままに、もう抑えられない。

dialogue.local_pron: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.
dialogue.en: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.
dialogue.en_pron: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore.

dialogue.ja: ありのままに、背を向けて扉を閉める。
dialogue.local: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.
dialogue.local_pron: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.
dialogue.en: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.
dialogue.en_pron: Let it go, let it go, turn my back and slam the door.

dialogue.zh: 我站在這裡，將會留在這裡。
dialogue.ja: ここに立ち、ここに留まる。

dialogue.local_pron: And here I stand, and here I'll stay.
dialogue.en: And here I stand, and here I'll stay.
dialogue.en_pron: And here I stand, and here I'll stay.

dialogue.ja: ありのままに、ありのままに。
dialogue.local: Let it go, let it go.
dialogue.local_pron: Let it go, let it go.
dialogue.en: Let it go, let it go.
dialogue.en_pron: Let it go, let it go.

dialogue.ja: 寒さなんて気にならない。
dialogue.local: The cold never bothered me anyway.
dialogue.local_pron: The cold never bothered me anyway.
dialogue.en: The cold never bothered me anyway.
dialogue.en_pron: The cold never bothered me anyway.

dialogue.text: Standing frozen in the life I've chosen.
dialogue.zh: 站在我選擇的生活中，冰冷凝固。
dialogue.ja: 選んだ人生に凍りついて立っている。
dialogue.local: Standing frozen in the life I've chosen.
dialogue.local_pron: Standing frozen in the life I've chosen.
dialogue.en: Standing frozen in the life I've chosen.
dialogue.en_pron: Standing frozen in the life I've chosen.

dialogue.text: You won't find me.
dialogue.zh: 你找不到我。
dialogue.ja: 私を見つけられない。
dialogue.local: You won't find me.
dialogue.local_pron: You won't find me.
dialogue.en: You won't find me.
dialogue.en_pron: You won't find me.

dialogue.text: The past is all behind me, buried in the snow.
dialogue.zh: 過去都留在我身後，埋藏在雪中。
dialogue.ja: 過去はすべて後ろに、雪の中に埋もれている。
dialogue.local: The past is all behind me, buried in the snow.
dialogue.local_pron: The past is all behind me, buried in the snow.
dialogue.en: The past is all behind me, buried in the snow.
dialogue.en_pron: The past is all behind me, buried in the snow.
